meaning: 安特里姆郡[英国北爱尔兰郡名]
examples: Provoked a spat with Sinn Fein days before the soldiers in Antrim were killed.
Vera Schwarcz's new book of poetry Chisel of Remembrance was published by Antrim House.
Two British soldiers at a base in Antrim took delivery of a last pizza before deploying to Afghanistan and were mown down in the street.
Cavan attacked frantically and almost created a goal chance but Antrim got home by three points.
Antrim voter Edward LeMay voted for John McCain, but almost voted for Rudy Giuliani.
